name: Yummy Yam Gai- Chicken Salad (Chopstix)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the shallots, garlic, and peanut oil in a small skillet over medium heat.
2. Cook until the oil sizzles and the garlic turns white. If it browns, discard it.
3. Immediately tip out the contents of the pan and let cool.
4. Transfer the mixture to a food processor and blend thoroughly with the remaining dressing ingredients.
5. Keep the dressing at room temperature up to 1 day in advance. Otherwise, store in the refrigerator and return to room temperature before serving.
6. Assemble the salad by tossing all ingredients together.
7. Use basil or mint and lime wedges as garnish.
